name: Jiebing Chen
abstract: Jiebing Chen (simplified Chinese: 陈 洁 冰; traditional Chinese: 陳潔冰; pinyin: Chén Jiébīng; sometimes credited as Jie-Bing Chen) is a Chinese musician based in the United States who specializes in the erhu (two-string fiddle).

concerts.label: Carnegie Hall Family Concert: Intercultural Journeys: East Meets West
